summary_en: Orion Breweries executed a share buyback of up to 425,000 shares (1.00% of outstanding) at ¥1,157 per share via ToSTNeT-3 on May 19, 2026, for a total of up to ¥491.7M.
title_en: Notice regarding acquisition of treasury shares through off-market ToSTNeT-3 transactions
translation_en_brief: Orion Breweries announced on May 18, 2026 the execution details of a share buyback previously authorized by the board on May 14, 2026. The company will conduct an off-market purchase (ToSTNeT-3) of up to 425,000 ordinary shares, representing 1.00% of shares outstanding (excluding treasury shares), on May 19, 2026 at the closing price of ¥1,157 per share, for a maximum aggregate consideration of ¥491,725,000. The purchase order is valid only during the specified trading window on May 19, 2026 at 08:45 JST on the Tokyo Stock Exchange. Results of the acquisition will be disclosed after the trading session closes. This action is subject to market conditions and may be executed in part or not at all.
